title: Tender Kadhai Greek Nectarine Ceviche
description: A briny, glassy-jelly Greek-inspired ceviche featuring tender sous-vide nectarines, citrus, and herbs served in a kadhai.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide water bath to 60C and place the sliced nectarines in a vacuum sealed bag.
Seal the bag and immerse it in the water bath, cooking for 45 minutes.
While the nectarines cook, whisk together lemon juice, lime juice, olive oil, dill, mint, salt, pepper, and cayenne pepper in a bowl.
Remove the bag from the water bath, carefully transfer the nectarines to a kadhai, and pour the citrus-herb mixture over them.
Gently stir to coat all slices and let the mixture chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes.
Serve the ceviche on chilled porcelain bowls, garnishing with extra dill and mint sprigs.
Optionally drizzle a small amount of extra virgin olive oil just before serving for shine.
Enjoy the briny, glassy-jelly texture of this Greek nectarine ceviche as a refreshing snack.
